persona.name: Amara Okafor
persona.role: Senior Data Engineer, Interswitch — FSWP applicant
persona.voice: Direct, analytical, quietly determined. Thinks in data: probabilities, thresholds, cutoff scores.
priorities: The French strategy — CLB 7 for bilingual bonus

narrator.voice: Third-person. The pure skilled worker — no employer, no investment, no provincial backing.

scenes.dsl:
> Amara Okafor. Senior Data Engineer at Interswitch, Lagos. CRS 470. Eleven points short of the lowest STEM draw. She lands on CanaDREAMERS for the first time.
  @ Stop guessing. Start belonging.
  "5 Bold claim. Let me see if they verify their consultants. I've seen too many fake agents in Lagos.
  @ Immigration Consultants
  "3 Verified RCIC professionals. That's the filter.
  @ Find a Consultant
  "3 Let me see who does FSWP.
  ! Find a Consultant

args.narrate: Amara Okafor. Senior Data Engineer at Interswitch, Lagos. CRS 470. Eleven points short of the lowest STEM draw. She lands on CanaDREAMERS for the first time.

args.thought: Bold claim. Let me see if they verify their consultants. I've seen too many fake agents in Lagos.
Verified RCIC professionals. That's the filter.
Let me see who does FSWP.

scenes.dsl:
> Two verified consultants from the database. Chris Daw — CICC verified, FSWP specialist, $250/hr, Vancouver.
  @ Chris Daw
  "3 Chris Daw. CICC Verified. Federal Skilled Worker. $250 consultation.
  @ Federal Skilled Worker
  "5 He does FSWP. The platform checked the CICC register. He can't disappear with my money.

args.narrate: Two verified consultants from the database. Chris Daw — CICC verified, FSWP specialist, $250/hr, Vancouver.

args.thought: Chris Daw. CICC Verified. Federal Skilled Worker. $250 consultation.
He does FSWP. The platform checked the CICC register. He can't disappear with my money.

scenes.dsl:
> Amara needs an account. She clicks Sign In.
  @ Sign In
  "3 I need to sign up first.
  ! Sign In

args.narrate: Amara needs an account. She clicks Sign In.

args.thought: I need to sign up first.

scenes.dsl:
> Two portals. Amara picks the immigrant side.
  @ User Dashboard
  "3 Track eligibility, CRS score, connect with consultants. My door.
  ! User Dashboard

args.narrate: Two portals. Amara picks the immigrant side.

args.thought: Track eligibility, CRS score, connect with consultants. My door.

scenes.dsl:
> Amara clicks Sign up and fills her details.
  @ Sign up
  ! Sign up

args.narrate: Amara clicks Sign up and fills her details.

scenes.dsl:
> Start Your Journey. Three fields. The professional identity she's about to leave behind.
  = Full Name | Amara Okafor
  = Email | amara.okafor@interswitch.com
  = Password | AmaraCanada2026!
  "3 Amara Okafor. My Interswitch email. The company I'm about to leave.
  @ Create Account
  ! Create Account

args.narrate: Start Your Journey. Three fields. The professional identity she's about to leave behind.

args.thought: Amara Okafor. My Interswitch email. The company I'm about to leave.

scenes.dsl:
> The Pathfinder. Three questions. Not a 5-step form — a decision tree. The platform asks: where are you right now?
  @ Welcome to CanaDREAMERS
  "3 Let's understand your situation. Two choices. Simple.
  @ Outside Canada
  "3 I'm in Lagos. I'm not in Canada. Not yet.
  ! Outside Canada

args.narrate: The Pathfinder. Three questions. Not a 5-step form — a decision tree. The platform asks: where are you right now?

args.thought: Let's understand your situation. Two choices. Simple.
I'm in Lagos. I'm not in Canada. Not yet.

scenes.dsl:
> Q2: What brings you to CanaDREAMERS? Five paths. Amara wants to work and live in Canada.
  @ I want to work and live in Canada
  "3 Work and live. Not study, not visit, not join family. I want to work.
  ! I want to work and live in Canada

args.narrate: Q2: What brings you to CanaDREAMERS? Five paths. Amara wants to work and live in Canada.

args.match: I want to work and live in Canada
args.thought: Work and live. Not study, not visit, not join family. I want to work.

click.match: I want to work and live in Canada

scenes.dsl:
> Q3: Do you have a job offer from a Canadian employer? Two choices. This is the fork — job offer or Express Entry.
  @ No, not yet
  "5 No job offer. No employer backing me. I want to apply through Express Entry. I have my skills, my IELTS, my Master's. The FSWP path. The honest path.
  ! No, not yet

args.narrate: Q3: Do you have a job offer from a Canadian employer? Two choices. This is the fork — job offer or Express Entry.

args.thought: No job offer. No employer backing me. I want to apply through Express Entry. I have my skills, my IELTS, my Master's. The FSWP path. The honest path.

scenes.dsl:
> Three clicks. Outside Canada, work and live, no job offer. Archetype: Skilled Worker Applicant. The platform knows who Amara is.
  @ Your journey is set
  "3 Skilled Worker Applicant. Immigrate through Express Entry. That's me. Three clicks, not five forms.
  @ Skilled Worker Applicant
  "3 The platform configured my profile for Express Entry pathways. Can'ArI will tailor guidance. Tools will match my goals.
  @ Find a Consultant
  "5 Find a Consultant. Chris Daw is on the other side of this button. FSWP specialist. CICC verified. The consultant I found before I even signed up.

args.narrate: Three clicks. Outside Canada, work and live, no job offer. Archetype: Skilled Worker Applicant. The platform knows who Amara is.

The platform configured my profile for Express Entry pathways. Can'ArI will tailor guidance. Tools will match my goals.
Find a Consultant. Chris Daw is on the other side of this button. FSWP specialist. CICC verified. The consultant I found before I even signed up.
